Header file for declaring the constructor of the DigitalOut class in the JerryScript mbed drivers.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines an interface for a `DigitalOut` class in the JerryScript and mbed OS integration. It includes a preprocessor directive to prevent multiple inclusions of the header file, using the macro `_JERRYSCRIPT_MBED_DRIVERS_DIGITALOUT_H`. The file includes the `wrap_tools.h` header from the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry`, which likely provides necessary tools for wrapping C++ classes for use in JerryScript. The `DECLARE_CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR(DigitalOut);` macro is used to declare the constructor for the `DigitalOut` class, facilitating its integration with the JerryScript engine.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/wrap_tools.h`
